TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Denis Sassou Nguesso == ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Denis Sassou Nguesso, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1943) mrhuw Republic of the Congo ta' misuw hya' ga Denis Sassou Nguesso, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1997 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Qnxan nya Denis Sassou Nguesso sa kawas 1969, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe ʦ~ʨoŋo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Denis Sassou Nguesso == ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Denis Sassou Nguesso, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1943) mrhuw Republic of the Congo ta' misuw hya' ga Denis Sassou Nguesso, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1997 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Qnxan nya Denis Sassou Nguesso sa kawas 1969, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe ʦ~ʨoŋo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja *enis~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕs~ɕou ŋues~ɕs~ɕo s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
